authLanding.title: Your fitness plan, made for real life.
authLanding.subtitle: A friendly expert coach that adapts when life gets messy — no guilt, no pressure.

adapt.title: Adapts to your week
adapt.body: Missed a workout, ate out, lost time? We smooth your plan, never punish you.

safe.title: Safe by default
safe.body: Your goal pace stays in the safe zone — Klean blocks anything risky and shows a kinder path.

zeroGuilt.title: Zero guilt
zeroGuilt.body: Even when you slip, the plan moves forward with you. We've got your back.

authLanding.signInHint: We'll never ask you to redo onboarding to reach your account.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account, plan, and preferences in one place.

goal.title: Your goal
goal.empty: No goal saved yet — finish onboarding to set one.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.unitsHint: Display only — saved values stay in metric for now.

about.title: About
about.tagline: Your friendly expert coach. Klean adjusts your fitness and nutrition plan when real life gets messy — without guilt.

signOutConfirm.title: Sign out for now?
signOutConfirm.body: We'll keep your plan safe. You can sign back in anytime to pick up exactly where you left off.

tip.label: Coach's Tip
tip.body: Hit a protein shake right after your session. 30g within 30 minutes maximises muscle recovery.

session.missedBanner: No worries — every day is a fresh start.
session.resetHint: Wipes the local entry. The next finish or miss will overwrite it.

plan.title: Today's plan
plan.subtitle: A simple target. Not a strict diet.
plan.incompleteBody: We'll show your daily plan once your goal and metrics are set.

suggestions.title: Simple ideas
suggestions.subtitle: Pick what fits your day. Nothing strict.
suggestions.noResultsBody: Your dietary preferences filter out our default ideas. We'll add more soon.

oatmeal_berries.title: Oatmeal with berries
oatmeal_berries.body: Rolled oats, mixed berries, a spoon of nut butter.

greek_yogurt_bowl.title: Greek yogurt bowl
greek_yogurt_bowl.body: Greek yogurt, granola, fruit, a drizzle of honey.

tofu_scramble.title: Tofu scramble
tofu_scramble.body: Crumbled tofu, turmeric, spinach, cherry tomatoes.

eggs_avocado_toast.title: Eggs & avocado toast
eggs_avocado_toast.body: Two eggs, mashed avocado on whole-grain toast.

chicken_rice_bowl.title: Chicken & rice bowl
chicken_rice_bowl.body: Grilled chicken, rice, roasted veg, lemon.

lentil_quinoa_salad.title: Lentil & quinoa salad
lentil_quinoa_salad.body: Lentils, quinoa, cucumber, tomato, olive oil.

salmon_sweet_potato.title: Salmon & sweet potato
salmon_sweet_potato.body: Baked salmon, sweet potato, steamed greens.

tofu_stir_fry.title: Tofu stir-fry
tofu_stir_fry.body: Tofu, mixed vegetables, soy sauce, brown rice.

turkey_meatballs.title: Turkey meatballs & pasta
turkey_meatballs.body: Lean turkey meatballs, whole-grain pasta, tomato sauce.

chickpea_curry.title: Chickpea curry
chickpea_curry.body: Chickpeas, tomato, coconut milk, basmati rice.

grilled_chicken_veg.title: Grilled chicken & veg
grilled_chicken_veg.body: Grilled chicken breast, mixed vegetables, olive oil.

fruit_almonds.title: Fruit & almonds
fruit_almonds.body: An apple or banana with a small handful of almonds.

cottage_cheese_fruit.title: Cottage cheese & fruit
cottage_cheese_fruit.body: Cottage cheese with fresh fruit and a sprinkle of seeds.

edamame.title: Edamame
edamame.body: A bowl of edamame with a pinch of salt.

events.title: How did today go?
events.subtitle: One tap. No judgment, no guilt.

followed_plan.label: Followed plan
followed_plan.message: Nice — staying on plan is the win we keep building on.

excess_food.label: Ate a bit extra
excess_food.message: All good. We'll spread it gently over the next 2–3 days.

skipped_meal.label: Skipped a meal
skipped_meal.message: We won't compensate by cutting more. Eat normally next meal.

ordered_food.label: Ordered out
ordered_food.message: Enjoyed it. We'll absorb it gently across the next few days.

alcohol.label: Drank alcohol
alcohol.message: No drama. We'll smooth it across the next 2–3 days.

insight.label: Nutrition Insight
insight.body: You're on track! Protein is at 57% — try a handful of almonds or a boiled egg to hit your goal.

feedback.title: Let's smooth this out
feedback.subtitle: Real life happens. We'll adjust your plan — no guilt, no punishment.
feedback.spreadInfo_one: Spread gently over the next {{count}} day
feedback.spreadInfo_other: Spread gently over the next {{count}} days
feedback.floorReachedBody: We capped the adjustment so your daily target stays at a safe level. The rest is forgotten — focus on tomorrow.
feedback.unaddressedKcal: {{kcal}} kcal kept off your plan to stay safe.
feedback.missingTimeframe: We'll adjust your plan as soon as we have your daily target.

unknownEvent.title: We couldn't read that signal
unknownEvent.message: No worries — your plan keeps moving forward. Try again from the home screen.

missed_workout.title: Missed workout
missed_workout.message: Skipping a session doesn't undo your progress. We'll fold today back into your week.
missed_workout.recommendation: Pick a way back in — quick session, reschedule, or focus on the key lifts.

partial_workout.title: Partial workout
partial_workout.message: Starting is the hard part — and you did it. We'll handle the rest.
partial_workout.recommendation: We can fold the missing exercises into your next session.

excess_food.title: A bit extra today
excess_food.message: One day above target won't slow you down. We'll spread the difference gently.
excess_food.recommendation: Small adjustments over 2–3 days — never below your safe minimum.

skipped_meal.title: Skipped meal
skipped_meal.message: Skipping a meal isn't a win — and we won't compensate by cutting more.
skipped_meal.recommendation: Eat normally at your next meal. Your daily target stays the same.

ordered_food.title: Ordered out
ordered_food.message: Ordering in is part of life. We'll smooth the extra calories over the next few days.
ordered_food.recommendation: Light adjustments only — no skipping meals, no aggressive cuts.

alcohol.title: A few drinks
alcohol.message: Enjoyed a drink? No drama. We'll absorb it gently across your week.
alcohol.recommendation: Hydrate well, sleep well, and let the next 2–3 days handle the rest.

no_machine.title: Machine unavailable
no_machine.message: Crowded gym? We'll swap to exercises that hit the same muscles.
no_machine.recommendation: Use free weights, cables, or bodyweight alternatives.

no_time.title: Tight on time
no_time.message: A short session beats no session. We'll keep the most important pieces.
no_time.recommendation: Try an express workout, then catch the rest later in the week.

express_workout.label: Express workout
express_workout.description: A focused {{min}} min session covering the essentials.

reschedule.label: Reschedule
reschedule.description: Move this session to your next available day.

integrate_key_exercises.label: Keep the key lifts
integrate_key_exercises.description: We'll fold the most important exercises into your next session.

swap_exercises.label: Swap exercises
swap_exercises.description: We'll suggest equivalents that target the same muscles.

gym.title: Scan your gym
gym.subtitle: Show us your gear and we'll tailor your program around it.
gym.intro: Add a few photos of the equipment you have access to. We'll detect what's there — you stay in control.
gym.noImagesHint: Pick at least one photo to start the scan.
gym.mockNotice: Demo mode — using sample images for now.

errors.providerBody: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.
errors.schemaBody: We couldn't understand the AI's reply. We'll try a different prompt next time.
errors.noDetectionsBody: We didn't spot any familiar equipment. Try clearer or closer photos.

results.title: We spotted these
results.subtitle: Uncheck anything that isn't really available — we'll plan around your selection.
results.addManualHint: Missing something? You can add it manually next.
results.savedBody: Your workout will adapt to the gear you confirmed.
results.noneSelectedHint: Pick at least one item or skip — your plan stays bodyweight-only otherwise.

fridge.title: Scan your fridge
fridge.subtitle: Show us what you've got and we'll suggest meals around it.
fridge.intro: Add a few photos of your fridge or pantry. We'll spot ingredients — you stay in control.
fridge.noImagesHint: Pick at least one photo to start the scan.
fridge.mockNotice: Test mode — your photos are real, but the AI analysis still uses a sample response.
fridge.permissionDeniedBody: Allow Klean AI to access your photos or camera in Settings to scan your fridge.
fridge.pickerUnavailableBody: We couldn't open the camera or photo library. Try again or use a demo image.
fridge.howItWorksStep1: Pick a real photo of your fridge or pantry.
fridge.howItWorksStep2: We detect ingredients — you confirm what's actually there.
fridge.howItWorksStep3: Your meal suggestions adapt to the food you have.

errors.providerBody: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.
errors.schemaBody: We couldn't understand the AI's reply. We'll try a different prompt next time.
errors.noDetectionsBody: We didn't spot any familiar ingredients. Try clearer or closer photos.

results.title: We spotted these
results.subtitle: Uncheck anything that isn't really there — we'll tailor your meal suggestions to what's left.
results.savedBody: Your meal suggestions will adapt to what you confirmed.
results.noneSelectedHint: Pick at least one item or skip — we'll fall back to general suggestions otherwise.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.
login.saveOnboardingHint: Sign in to save your plan and follow it.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: We'll save your plan so you can come back anytime.
register.postOnboardingSubtitle: Create your account to lock in your plan and never lose your progress.

benefits.save: Save your plan and pick up where you left off
benefits.track: Track your progress and goal over time
benefits.sync: Sync your data securely across devices
benefits.adapt: Unlock smart adjustments when life gets messy
benefits.resume: Never lose your plan or your goal

register.saveOnboardingHint: Create your account to save your plan and follow it.
register.checkEmailBody: We've sent you a confirmation link. Once you confirm, you can sign in and save your plan.

status.title: Account
status.loggedOutHint: Finish onboarding and tap Follow this program to save your plan.

goal.title: What's your main goal?
goal.subtitle: We'll build your plan around this.

metrics.title: Tell us about yourself
metrics.subtitle: This lets us personalise your plan safely.
metrics.targetWeightHint: Leave empty if you're not sure yet.

errors.ageTooYoung: You must be at least 18 to use Klean AI.
errors.heightInvalid: Height must be between 100 and 250 cm.
errors.weightInvalid: Weight must be between 30 and 300 kg.
errors.targetWeightInvalid: Target weight must be between 30 and 300 kg.
errors.targetMustBeLower: For a weight-loss goal, your target should be lower than your current weight.
errors.targetMustBeHigher: For a muscle-gain goal, your target should be higher than your current weight.
errors.targetMustBeClose: For maintenance, your target should be within ±3 kg of your current weight.

training.title: Your training habits
training.subtitle: We'll adapt your plan to your schedule.

fitnessLevel.title: What's your fitness level?
fitnessLevel.subtitle: We'll calibrate volume and intensity around this.
fitnessLevel.beginnerDescription: Less than 6 months of regular training, or just getting back into it. We'll start gentle and build progressively.
fitnessLevel.intermediateDescription: 6 months to 2 years of consistent training. Comfortable with the main lifts and able to push moderately hard.
fitnessLevel.advancedDescription: 2+ years of structured training. Strong technique, recovers well from intense sessions, and follows progressive overload.

sessionDuration.title: How long can you train per session?
sessionDuration.subtitle: Pick the time you can realistically protect.
sessionDuration.30Description: Express format — focused on consistency, perfect when life is busy.
sessionDuration.45Description: Balanced and efficient — covers the essentials with enough volume to progress.
sessionDuration.60Description: Complete session — full warm-up, all main lifts, and dedicated accessory work.
sessionDuration.75Description: Advanced or high-volume training — for serious progression and dedicated athletes.

availability.title: When can you train?
availability.subtitle: Pick the slots that actually work for your week.
availability.minOneRequired: Pick at least one slot to continue.
availability.tip: We'll only schedule sessions during the slots you've selected.

location.title: Where do you train?
location.subtitle: We'll find the right exercises for your setup.

nutritionPrefs.title: Dietary preferences
nutritionPrefs.subtitle: We'll never suggest foods you can't eat.
nutritionPrefs.hint: Select all that apply. You can update this anytime.

timeframe.title: When's your target?
timeframe.subtitle: We'll adapt your plan to your timeframe.
timeframe.sliderLabel: Slide to pick how many weeks
timeframe.recommendedHint: For this goal, the ideal timeframe is around {{weeks}} weeks.
timeframe.shorterAmbitiousHint: Shorter than recommended — your plan will be more ambitious.
timeframe.shorterUnsafeHint: This timeframe forces an unsafe pace. We'll suggest a safer alternative.
timeframe.longerHint: Comfortable timeframe — a calm and sustainable pace.
timeframe.matchHint: Right on target — calm, safe, and effective.
timeframe.noTargetHint: Pick the duration that matches your routine.

errors.durationInvalid: Please enter a valid duration (1–104 weeks).
errors.durationRequired: Please select or enter a duration.

safety.title: Safety check
safety.subtitle: Klean AI protects you from dangerous plans.
safety.allGoodSub: Your profile is safe. Let's build your plan.
safety.hasFlagsSub: We spotted some concerns. Here's what we found:

flags.ageTooYoung: You must be at least 18 to generate a plan. Chat with a doctor or parent first.
flags.caloriesTooLow: Your target puts you below the safe calorie minimum. We'll adjust this for you.
flags.deficitTooHigh: A deficit over 1,000 kcal/day is unsafe. We'll cap it at a healthy level.
flags.weightLossTooFast: Losing more than 1 kg/week risks muscle loss and health issues.
flags.weightGainTooFast: Gaining this fast leads to mostly fat gain, not muscle. We'll suggest a steadier pace.
flags.bmiTooLow: Your BMI suggests you may be underweight. Weight loss is not recommended.
flags.goalInconsistentLoss: Your target weight is higher than your current weight, but your goal is weight loss. Pick a lower target — or change your goal.
flags.goalInconsistentGain: Your target weight is lower than your current weight, but your goal is muscle gain. Pick a higher target — or change your goal.
flags.goalInconsistentMaintain: Your target is far from your current weight, but your goal is maintenance. Pick a closer target — or change your goal.

alternatives.title: What we recommend instead
alternatives.saferWeeks: Reach your goal safely in {{weeks}} weeks
alternatives.kickstart: Start with a 7-day Kickstart to build momentum
alternatives.partialProgress: You can safely lose {{kg}} kg before your event

kinds.validSub: We'll build a calm, safe and effective plan around this.
kinds.ambitiousSub: Your plan is more demanding than usual. You can stick with it, but we recommend the calmer alternative.
kinds.unsafeSub: This goal would force an unsafe pace. Pick a safer path so we can build the plan together.
kinds.inconsistentSub: Your goal and your target weight don't match. Adjust one of them to continue.

gate.saveErrorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

summary.title: Your plan is ready
summary.subtitle: Here's what we've built for you.
summary.mockNotice: Plan generation coming soon — your profile is saved.
